nodes.label: Arkansas State Treasury
observations: State Treasurer's office; portfolio ~$11 billion total (TREAS-SEP25-0008, APERS-JUL25-0002)
367 active Treasury documents in registry (of 909 total active docs across 4 agencies)
254 financial reports and 41 spreadsheets form core financial data
Current Treasurer: John Thurston; preceded by Larry Walther (who succeeded Dennis Milligan)
First Israel Bonds purchase initiated by Treasurer Milligan circa 2017
Three successive Treasurers (Milligan → Walther → Thurston) all continued Israel Bonds purchases
Key operational staff: Celeste Gladden (Investment Manager), Steve Pulley (Senior Investment Officer), Eric Munson (Chief Deputy Treasurer), Steven Kilgore (accounting)
Wire transfers for Israel Bonds processed through Computershare Trust Company, N.A.

nodes.label: Treasury Israel Bonds Purchase History
observations: PURCHASE 1 — Mar 2018: $20M, 10th Series Jubilee 2-Year Fixed, 2.73%, maturity 3/1/2020, CUSIP 46513XL40 (TREAS-SEP25-0062)
PURCHASE 2 — Apr 2019: $30M, 11th Series Jubilee 2-Year Fixed, 3.11%, maturity 1/15/2021 (TREAS-SEP25-0059)
PURCHASE 3 — Jan 2020: Multiple bonds: $5M 5-Year at 2.33%, $10M 10-Year at 2.83% (CUSIP 46513JHA2), plus 5-Year Institutional at 2.48% (TREAS-SEP25-0060)
PURCHASE 5 — Feb 2021: Signed investment forms, wire on receipt of bonds (TREAS-SEP25-0061, TREAS-SEP25-0015)
PURCHASE 7 — Oct/Nov 2023: $10M additional purchase post-10/7 attack, bringing total from $47M to $57M (TREAS-SEP25-0008, TREAS-SEP25-0015)
PURCHASE 8 — May 2025: $20M, authorized by executive team, two bonds ($10M 3-year + $10M 5-year per pattern), total position now $55M (TREAS-JUL25-0003, TREAS-SEP25-0015)
PURCHASE 9 — Feb 17, 2026: Wire confirmation sent by Celeste Gladden to Bradley Young/Luis Jimenez/Steve Pulley, cc Lawrence Berman (TREAS-FEB26-0108)
8 individual purchase record PDFs in FOIA Round 1 (TREAS-SEP25-0059 through 0066), plus Round 2 communications confirming 2026 purchase
CRITICAL FINDING: No independent credit analysis or risk assessment document found for ANY purchase across all 909 source documents
